$comment: Simplification metadata for a coord_precision-rounded GeoJSON. Records the rounding tolerance + feature counts so downstream area/length math is not silently lying. Per TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md Phase 1b (Hans v2 nit).
title: Tamil Nadu sub-districts (taluks), LGD-keyed
description: Per-taluk polygons for Tamil Nadu, sliced from the national LGD Subdistricts release. Geometries coordinate-rounded to 3 decimal places (~110 m) at emit time to fit the 12 MB per-file snapshot budget.
